state.next-action: Shipped draggable floating composer launcher (`PageComposerFloatingLauncher`, quick `quick-2026-04-08-composer-draggable-floating-launcher`): minimize uses motion exit + settings chip like Site Copilot; launcher persists position in localStorage. Resume `18-06` for shared-sections work.
